tasks.label: Release validate concise
args: & 'C:\Users\Jason\.platformio\penv\Scripts\platformio.exe' run --environment esp32-s3-devkitc-1-release *> '.pio\release_validate.log'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'BUILD_OK' } else { Get-Content '.pio\release_validate.log' -Tail 80; exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: Release build fullfb
args: & 'C:\Users\Jason\.platformio\penv\Scripts\platformio.exe' run --environment esp32-s3-devkitc-1-release *> '.pio\release_fullfb.log'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Get-Content '.pio\release_fullfb.log' -Tail 20 } else { Get-Content '.pio\release_fullfb.log' -Tail 120; exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: Release build vsync present
args: & 'C:\Users\Jason\.platformio\penv\Scripts\platformio.exe' run --environment esp32-s3-devkitc-1-release *> '.pio\release_vsync_present.log'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Get-Content '.pio\release_vsync_present.log' -Tail 120; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { Get-Content '.pio\release_vsync_present.log' -Tail 40 }

tasks.label: Release build queued-present
args: & 'C:\Users\Jason\.platformio\penv\Scripts\platformio.exe' run --environment esp32-s3-devkitc-1-release *> '.pio\release_queued_present.log'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Get-Content '.pio\release_queued_present.log' -Tail 140; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { Get-Content '.pio\release_queued_present.log' -Tail 40 }

args: & 'C:\Users\Jason\.platformio\penv\Scripts\platformio.exe' run --environment esp32-s3-devkitc-1-release *> '.pio\release_nav_boot.log'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Get-Content '.pio\release_nav_boot.log' -Tail 140; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { Get-Content '.pio\release_nav_boot.log' -Tail 40 }
